# Vendored Browser Runtime Licenses

The files in this directory are the pinned browser builds used by the Ultracode
dashboard so an installed plugin cache can serve the UI without `npm install` or
network access.

## React 18.3.1

- `react.production.min.js`
- `react-dom.production.min.js`

React and React DOM are distributed under the MIT license.

Source packages:

- https://www.npmjs.com/package/react/v/18.3.1
- https://www.npmjs.com/package/react-dom/v/18.3.1
